entity.label: Masrekah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Vineyard of noble vines, a place in Idumea, the native place of Samlah, one of the Edomitish kings (Gen. 36:36; 1 Chr. 1:47).

nodes.label: Masrekah
nodes.description: Vineyard of noble vines, a place in Idumea, the native place of Samlah, one of the Edomitish kings (Gen. 36:36; 1 Chr. 1:47).

verses.text: And Hadad died, and Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.
And when Hadad was dead, Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.
